sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat('select ',
pipeline().parameters.p_pl_projectid, ' project_code, ',
'''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.function_code,'''',' function_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.source_code,'''',' source_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_source_code,'''',' sub_source_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_code,'''',' data_class_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_sub_class_code,'''',' data_sub_class_code,',
'''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure,'''',' unit_of_measure,',
'ph.Code phase_code,
sr.Code schedule_resource_code,
u.Code work_unit_code,
wa.Code work_area_code,
ac.Activity activity_code,
cw.Name IWP_Code,
ac.CWP CWP_Code,
isnull(a.WK1,0) WK1,
isnull(a.WK2,0) WK2,
isnull(a.WK3,0) WK3,
isnull(a.WK4,0) WK4,
isnull(a.WK5,0) WK5,
isnull(a.WK6,0) WK6,',
'dateadd(Day,0,','''', activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk1,',
'dateadd(Day,7,','''', activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk2,',
'dateadd(Day,14,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk3,',
'dateadd(Day,21,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk4,',
'dateadd(Day,28,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk5,',
'dateadd(Day,35,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk6',
',
getdate() process_date from [dbo].[fntbl_6WeekLookAhead](','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',',','''','All','''',') a,
 [dbo].[SP_ConstructionWorkPack] cw,
 [dbo].PM_Activity ac,
 SP_ScheduleResource sr,
 SP_WorkArea wa,
 SP_Unit u,
 SP_Phases ph
where a.L3ID_CWPNum = cw.Name
and cw.ActivityID = ac.ID
and cw.ScheduleResourceID = sr.ID
and ac.ScheduleWorkArea = wa.Code
and wa.UnitID = u.ID
and wa.PhaseID = ph.ID',
' union all ',
' select ',
pipeline().parameters.p_pl_projectid, ' project_code, ',
'''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.function_code,'''',' function_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.source_code,'''',' source_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.sub_source_code,'''',' sub_source_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_class_code,'''',' data_class_code,','''',
activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.data_sub_class_code,'''',' data_sub_class_code,',
'''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.unit_of_measure,'''',' unit_of_measure,',
'ph.Code phase_code,
sr.Code schedule_resource_code,
u.Code work_unit_code,
wa.Code work_area_code,
ac.Activity activity_code,','''',
'','''',' IWP_Code,
ac.CWP CWP_Code,
isnull(a.WK1,0) WK1,
isnull(a.WK2,0) WK2,
isnull(a.WK3,0) WK3,
isnull(a.WK4,0) WK4,
isnull(a.WK5,0) WK5,
isnull(a.WK6,0) WK6,',
'dateadd(Day,0,','''', activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk1,',
'dateadd(Day,7,','''', activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk2,',
'dateadd(Day,14,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk3,',
'dateadd(Day,21,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk4,',
'dateadd(Day,28,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk5,',
'dateadd(Day,35,','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',') eff_date_wk6',
',getdate() process_date from [dbo].[fntbl_6WeekLookAhead](','''',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters').output.firstRow.start_date,'''',',','''','All','''',') a,
  [dbo].PM_Activity ac,
 SP_ScheduleResource sr,
 SP_WorkArea wa,
 SP_Unit u,
 SP_Phases ph
where a.L3ID_CWPNum = ac.Activity
and ac.ScheduleResourceID = sr.ID
and ac.ScheduleWorkArea = wa.Code
and wa.UnitID = u.ID
and wa.PhaseID = ph.ID
and (select count(*) from [dbo].[SP_ConstructionWorkPack] cw where cw.Name = a.L3ID_CWPNum) = 0')
